/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/ProjectSkyblock.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProjectSkyblock.dir/dataToken.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProjectSkyblock.dir/itemHour.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProjectSkyblock.dir/SkyblockItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProjectSkyblock.dir/lib/sqlite/sqlite3.c.o CMakeFiles/ProjectSkyblock.dir/DataBaseManager.cpp.o -o ProjectSkyblock  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
